revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-600

Alternative term: Telemetering

Measurement with the aid of intermediate means which permit the measurement to be interpreted at a distance from the primary detector.


Note: 1 The distinctive feature of telemetering is the nature of the translating means, which includes the provisions for converting the quantity to be measured into a representative quantity of another kind that can be transmitted conveniently for measurement at a distance.

Note: 2 In normal French usage "telemetrie" means remote measurement of length.

Reference: I.E.E.E. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
